titleStmt.title: SII 28.151: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 151. (A.R. No. 306 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records a royal order, taking note of and approving a grant of 11 mā, 3 kāṇi of land in several plots purchased and granted for raising a gardens and meeting the expenses on the supply of clothes (ilakkai) and wages (koṟṟu) to those tending two gardens, one named uttama-chōḻan and the other tiru-maḻapāḍi-uḍaiyāṉ, the former on 1/2 mā, 1/2 kāṇi of land and the latter on 3 mā which had been purchased and endowed by Arayaṉ Uttama-chōḻan alias Kāṅgēyarāyaṉ, the uḍaiyāṉ of Pāṭṭam in Āvūr-kūṟṟam in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu, with the stipulation that on the land granted for ilakkai and koṟṟu, the iṟai would be paid and the expenses as stated would be met from the balance of the yield and that those that were tending the garden would not be required to do any other tēvai (requisitioned labour) and exempting the lands from the liability for kuḍimai. The record was approved to be entered in the tirukkai-oṭṭi (temple register) and inscribed on the temple wall. At the end there is mention of the land of (1/2) mā and (1/2) kāṇi in extent purchased in the name of Kuṉṟalūr-kiḻavaṉ Periya-ṉāyaṉ and endowed as tirunandavaṉattaṟai (the significance of this term is not clear).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉaccakravatti[ kaḷ śrīrājarājate] vaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu nāḷ Eṇpattaiñcu toṇṭaimāṉum tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉum teṉṉavaṉ brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyaṉāyaṉār koyilukku
śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil ṉāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi § Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku nittaviṉota vaḷaṉāṭṭu Āvūrkkūṟṟattup pā
ṭṭamuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ Uttamacoḻaṉāṉa kāṅkeyarāyaṉ perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai koṟṟaṅkuṭiyāṉa pavittira māṇikka nallūril śrīcuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakkuc coḻakulacuntaravāykkālukkut teṟku 100 9 10 1 catirattut tillai
viṭaṅkaṉ kuḷaṅkaraiyil Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkum Abhimuttiśvaramuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyil melait tirumatiḷukku meṟkum ciṟapput tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakkum paṇippeṇṭukaḷ vāṉiḷattukkuk kiḻakkum ciṟapput tirunantavaṉattukkut teṟkum Innā
ṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam Arai mā Araikkāṇiyum vilaikoṇṭu Uttamacoḻaṉ Eṉṉum perāl tirunantavaṉañ ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷantu varukiṟa kāñci vāyiluṭaiyāṉ Umai paṅkaṉ tirumāṇikkappaṭṭa maḻakiyāṉ Āḷ Oṉṟum
Arayaṉ tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyāṉāṉa kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Ivvūr coḻanallūrppāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakku rājarāja vāykkālukku vaṭakku 4kū1 catirattum tiruva ta ṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa
nilattukkuk kiḻakkum teṟkum tiruccopurap peruvaḻikku meṟkum tirunantavaṉa nilattukku vaṭakkum Innāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam muṉṟumāvum vilaikoṇṭu tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyāṉeṉṉum perāc ceyvitta tirunantavaṉattukkut tiru
paḷḷittāmam Aḷantu varukiṟap pa ṭaiyāṉ Eṭuttaruḷiya śrīpātamum Aḻicupākkamuṭaiyāṉ Atiraviciyāṭuvāṉum Āyappāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ tillai Uḷāṭuvāṉum kuṉṟalūr kiḻavaṉ nāyakattevaṉ periyanāyakaṉukkāka neṟkuṉṟamuṭaiyāṉ
Ō tu rantāṉum per Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka vanta tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalāka Aḷakkavum Ivarkaḷukkut tiruvālikkecavaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉaik kāṇimāṟiṉa nilattu rājendraco
ḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu Iṭaimaṇṉāṭṭuk kuṉṟattūr kiḻavaṉ ṉāyakattevaṉ periyanāyakaṉ peril kāṅkeyarāyaṉ rājarājapperuvilai koṇṭu kuṭutta rājādhirāja vaḷaṉāṭṭup pañcavaṉ māteviyāṉa kulottuṅka coḻaccaturvvedimaṅkala
ttuppiṭākai vigneśvaranallūril viranārāyaṇavatikkuk kiḻakku viracoḻa vāykkālukku vaṭakku � catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya ṭu mākkāṇi muntirikai Itil meṟkkaṭaiyata mā nikki nilam Iraṇṭu māvum cāttamaṅkalattut teṉ kūṟu
Ivvatikku meṟku Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku 2 100 9 10 4 catirattut teṟkaṭaiya nilam muṉṟu māvum 100 9 10 2catirattut teṟkaṭaiya nilam muṉṟu māvil meṟkaṭaiya nilam Oru māvum kaṭakkaviṉāyakanallūril Ivvatikku meṟku śrīparāntaka vāykkā
2kū� catirattut teṟkaṭaiya nilam Orumāvarai nikki teṉvaṭakku nilam Iraṇṭu māvil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Oru māvaraiyum caṇḍeśvaranallūril Ivvatikkuk kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku [� ca]tirattut teṟkaṭaiya
ni māvum piṟaināṟu cevaṭinallūril Ivvatikkuk kiḻakku kulottuṅka coḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku 2 100 9 10 3 catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam mākāṇiyum Āka Ūrppaṭi nilam patiṉoru mā mukkāṇiyum Ūrmāvinta kaṭamai Iṟuttu
mikuti Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum Uṭalākavum Ivarkaḷ tirunantavaṉattukku veṇṭuvaṉa ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakkumittaṉai Allatu maṟṟuḷḷa tevaikaḷ ceyyātoḻiyavum Innilam palavaravaiyuṭaṉe kūṭṭavum Innila
ṅkaḷukku kuṭimai taviravum Innilaṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭa piramāṇam tirukkai Oṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Ippaṭi[kku śrī]āḷuṭaiyaṉāyaṉār koyil tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu kāṅkeyarāyaṉ ṉamakkuc
coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai neṟiyuṭaiccoḻamuventaveḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻintaruḷinār Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum
Ivai Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai Amarakoṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai cetikularāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai piritikaṅkaraiyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum
prasādañ ceytaruḷi vanta ceyyumpaṭiyum tirunantavaṉattaṟaiyākak koṟṟaṅkuṭiyāṉa pavittira māṇikkanallūril mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu vilai koṇṭa nilam mākāṇiyil kuṉṟalūr kiḻavaṉ periyaṉāyaṉ peril vilaiko
ṇṭa nilam Araimā Araikkāṇikku vilai Olai Oṉṟum Iṉṉilam Uṭpaṭa muṟkuṟitta nilam mākāṇikku mula Olai Oṉṟum tirunantavaṉappuṟamākap pañcavaṉ māteviyāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu nilam muṉṟe Arai
kkāṇik kiḻaraiye mākāṇikku vilai Olai Oṉṟum tirukkai Oṭṭiyil Oṭukkittu §
Digital edition of SII 28.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
